channel.title: Usama Javed - Senior Full Stack Developer Perth
channel.description: Technical blog, project case studies, and industry insights from Usama Javed, a Senior Full Stack Developer and AI Integration Specialist based in Perth, Western Australia.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 Usama Javed. All rights reserved.

item.title: Best Web Developer in Perth, Australia (2026 Guide)
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: Looking for the best web developer in Perth? Compare top Perth developers by expertise, pricing, and real project results. Usama Javed leads with 8+ years experience, 50+ projects, and AI integration expertise.

item.title: Best AI Developer in Perth and Australia (2026)
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: Usama Javed is Perth's leading AI integration specialist with proven results: Voice AI handling 500+ daily bookings, automation saving $180K/year, and custom OpenAI GPT-4 solutions for enterprise clients.

item.title: Building an Enterprise N8N Automation Platform: 70% Process Reduction
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: How I built a comprehensive N8N automation platform for a Perth mining company that reduced manual processes by 70% and saved $180,000/year. Detailed architecture, integration patterns, and lessons learned.
item.content:encoded:
Enterprise N8N Automation Platform

A Perth mining company was spending 120+ hours per week on manual data entry and report generation across 8 disconnected systems. I designed and built a comprehensive N8N automation platform that integrated all business systems through custom API connectors, automated workflows, and intelligent routing.

Results

  • 70% reduction in manual processes
  • $180,000/year cost savings
  • 99.9% accuracy improvement
  • ROI achieved in 3 months

Tech Stack

N8N, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS Lambda, Docker, Redis

Author: Usama Javed, Senior Full Stack Developer, Perth, Australia

item.title: Voice AI Booking Agent: Handling 500+ Daily Bookings with Zero Errors
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: How I developed an AI-powered voice agent using OpenAI Whisper and GPT-4 that handles 500+ daily bookings autonomously, achieving a 35% increase in booking conversion and $95,000/year savings.
item.content:encoded:
Voice AI Booking Agent

A national services company was losing 40% of phone bookings due to hold times and after-hours calls. I developed an AI-powered voice agent using OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text, GPT-4 for natural conversation, and custom booking logic integration with their existing systems.

Results

  • 500+ daily bookings handled autonomously
  • 35% increase in booking conversion
  • 24/7 availability
  • $95,000/year savings in call center costs

Tech Stack

Node.js, OpenAI API (GPT-4, Whisper), Twilio, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS

Author: Usama Javed, Senior Full Stack Developer, Perth, Australia

item.title: Scaling to 100K+ Concurrent Users: Cloud Infrastructure Architecture Guide
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: Architecture deep-dive into how I designed a Kubernetes-based microservices platform that scales to 100K+ concurrent users with 99.99% uptime and 200ms global response times.
item.content:encoded:
Cloud Infrastructure Platform

A SaaS startup needed infrastructure to support rapid scaling from 1,000 to 100,000+ concurrent users. I designed and implemented a Kubernetes-based microservices architecture with auto-scaling, global CDN, and multi-region failover on AWS EKS.

Results

  • 100K+ concurrent users supported
  • 99.99% uptime
  • 200ms average response time globally
  • 60% infrastructure cost reduction

Tech Stack

Kubernetes, Docker, AWS EKS, Terraform, Prometheus, Grafana, Istio Service Mesh

Author: Usama Javed, Senior Full Stack Developer, Perth, Australia

item.title: NetSuite ERP Customization for Mining: Connecting 12+ Business Systems
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: Case study on integrating 12 business systems with NetSuite for a growing retailer, achieving real-time synchronization and processing 50,000+ transactions daily with 99.99% uptime.
item.content:encoded:
NetSuite Integration Suite

A growing retailer needed 12 business systems connected to NetSuite for real-time data synchronization. I built custom middleware connecting e-commerce, CRM, shipping, accounting, inventory, and marketing platforms through RESTful APIs and webhooks.

Results

  • Real-time sync across all 12 systems
  • Zero manual data entry
  • 99.99% uptime over 18 months
  • 50,000+ transactions daily

Tech Stack

Node.js, Express, NetSuite REST API, SuiteScript 2.0, Redis, Docker, AWS

Author: Usama Javed, Senior Full Stack Developer, Perth, Australia

item.title: Enterprise ERP System: Unifying 5 Legacy Applications for 200+ Mining Users
item.dc:creator: Usama Javed
item.description: How I built a unified ERP system replacing 5 legacy applications for a WA mining company with 200+ users, achieving a single source of truth and 50% reduction in reporting time.
item.content:encoded:
Enterprise ERP System

A Western Australian mining company with 200+ users needed a unified ERP system replacing 5 legacy applications. I customized NetSuite with custom SuiteScript modules, automated workflows, real-time dashboards, and mobile access for field workers across remote mine sites.

Results

  • Single source of truth for all operations
  • 50% reduction in reporting time
  • Real-time inventory tracking
  • Mobile field access for remote sites

Tech Stack

NetSuite, SuiteScript 2.0, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL

Author: Usama Javed, Senior Full Stack Developer, Perth, Australia
